MUSP402 Music Performance (2 Credits) Senior course, in the minor series.

MUSP403 Music Performance (2 Credits) Senior course, in the minor series.

MUSP409 Music Performance (2-4 Credits) Senior course in the principal series.

MUSC812 Doctoral Opera Techniques II (2 Credits) Continuation of MUSC811. Techniques for opera preformance: Scene Study II; Acting II; Movement II: Stage Combat I; and Mask; and methodology seminar. Prerequisite: MUSC811; and permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Credit Only Granted for: MUSC612 or MUSC812.

MUSP410 Music Performance (2-4 Credits) Senior course in the principal series. Recital required.
